_comment: GroundZeroOS config. Secrets go in .env (never commit .env). Set vault_root here OR via GROUNDZERO_VAULT_ROOT in .env.

llm._comment: Any model on https://openrouter.ai/models works. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env — no key needed here.

model_tiers._comment: planning = phase decomposition + task atomisation (always uses the best model). light/standard/heavy = execution tiers, auto-classified per task.

notify._openclaw_comment: Set target to your E.164 number. Requires openclaw CLI installed + logged in. Alternatively set OPENCLAW_NOTIFY_TARGET env var.

_linear_comment: Uncomment and fill in to enable Linear integration (gzos import + phase uplink).
